hero.title: Hairspray
hero.reason: In honor of World Intellectual Property Day, Hairspray is a movie that celebrates self-expression and creativity, values that are at the heart of intellectual property.
hero.blurb: This musical comedy is a fun and upbeat film that showcases the importance of individuality and innovation. With its catchy soundtrack and energetic dance numbers, Hairspray is a movie that will leave you feeling inspired and empowered.

released.title: The Hitcher
released.reason: Released today in 2007, The Hitcher is a suspenseful thriller that still holds up today with its tense atmosphere and strong performances.
released.blurb: This movie is a gripping road trip thriller that will keep you on the edge of your seat. With its twists and turns, The Hitcher is a wild ride that you won't want to miss.

birthday.title: The Big Lebowski
birthday.reason: Happy birthday to Carol Kane, The Big Lebowski is a quirky comedy that showcases her unique talent and offbeat charm.
birthday.blurb: This cult classic is a hilarious and offbeat comedy that has become a staple of modern cinema. With its eccentric characters and witty dialogue, The Big Lebowski is a movie that will leave you laughing and entertained.

awful.title: I Know Who Killed Me
awful.reason: This psychological thriller is infamous for its confusing plot and poor acting, making it a notoriously bad movie with terrible reviews.
awful.blurb: This movie is a cringeworthy mess that will leave you scratching your head. With its nonsensical plot twists and over-the-top performances, I Know Who Killed Me is a trainwreck that you can't look away from.
